properties.name: Bandar Abbas Naval Base
properties.notes: Primary IRGCN launch hub; home to fast-attack craft and anti-ship ballistic missiles. Used extensively in 2026 strikes.

properties.name: Bushehr Air Base
properties.notes: IRGC Aerospace Force air base co-located with Bushehr nuclear site region.

properties.name: Shiraz Missile Base
properties.notes: Houses Shahab-3 and cruise missile units; key staging base in Fars Province.

properties.name: Khorramabad Underground Base
properties.notes: Tunnel complex in Zagros mountains; houses Fateh-110 and Zolfaghar short-range ballistic missiles.

properties.name: Bakhtaran Missile Base
properties.notes: Underground facility near Kermanshah; believed to house Paveh cruise missiles and ballistic units.

properties.name: Tabriz Missile Base
properties.notes: Northern IRGC silo complex; Shahab-3 range covers Israel and SE Europe.

properties.name: Imam Ali Missile Base
properties.notes: Large underground missile city in central Iran; revealed by IRGC in 2020. Stores Emad and Ghadr variants.

properties.name: Haji Abad Missile Base
properties.notes: Underground complex in Hormozgan, close to Strait of Hormuz; used for rapid UAE-theater launches.

properties.name: Khorgu Suspected Base
properties.notes: Suspected IRGCN/IRGC-ASF drone and missile staging site near Bandar Abbas; identified by satellite imagery.

properties.name: Qom Underground Base
properties.notes: Deep underground missile complex near Qom; believed to be primary Khorramshahr-4 storage facility.

properties.name: Khorasan Missile Base
properties.notes: Northeast Iran IRGC base; covers Central Asia and eastern NATO flanks; Shahab-3 and Sejjil units reported.

properties.name: Ahvaz IRGC Aerospace Base
properties.notes: Southwest Iran forward base; Shahed-136 drone launch staging during Gulf operations.

properties.name: Isfahan Missile Research Complex
properties.notes: Major IRGC research and storage facility; associated with Fateh-313 and cruise missile development.

properties.name: Chabahar Naval Forward Base
properties.notes: Deep-water naval base on Gulf of Oman; drone boat and loitering munition staging for Gulf of Oman operations.
